mod.name: Ratkin Misc+ 鼠族拓展:边缘杂货铺
瓦莱丽的米莉拉扩展包

pawn.name: 运载单元 2
pawn.data: 运载单元 2*Milira_DroneFreight*斯特达|ResearchExpedition*运载单元 2*29862409*34989595*0***0*****FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*-1*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF******Firefighter|0:Patient|0:Doctor|0:PatientBedRest|0:BasicWorker|0:Warden|0:Handling|0:Cooking|0:Hunting|0:Construction|0:Growing|0:Mining|0:PlantCutting|0:Smithing|0:Tailoring|0:Art|0:Crafting|0:Hauling|3:Cleaning|0:Research|0:Childcare|0:DarkStudy|0:Fishing|0:Diplomat|0:RK_WorkType_GeneratePower|0:MNBloodDraw|0****Kills|0:KillsHumanlikes|0:KillsAnimals|0:KillsMechanoids|0:PawnsDowned|0:PawnsDownedHumanlikes|0:PawnsDownedAnimals|0:PawnsDownedMechanoids|0:ShotsFired|0:Headshots|0:DamageDealt|26:DamageTaken|6:TimesInMentalState|0:TimesOnFire|0:FiresExtinguished|0:OperationsReceived|0:OperationsPerformed|0:TimesTendedTo|0:TimesTendedOther|0:PeopleCaptured|0:PrisonersRecruited|0:PrisonersChatted|0:AnimalsTamed|0:AnimalsSlaughtered|0:MealsCooked|0:ThingsConstructed|0:ThingsInstalled|28:ThingsRepaired|0:ThingsCrafted|0:ThingsHauled|9394:PlantsSown|0:PlantsHarvested|6:CellsMined|0:MessesCleaned|0:ResearchPointsResearched|0:CorpsesBuried|0:NutritionEaten|0:BodiesStripped|0:ThingsUninstalled|0:ThingsDeconstructed|0:ArtifactsActivated|0:ContainersOpened|0:SwitchesFlicked|0:TimeAsColonistOrColonyAnimal|2.987704E+07:TimeAsQuestLodger|0:TimeAsPrisoner|0:TimeInBed|0:TimeInBedForMedicalReasons|0:TimeDowned|0:TimeGettingFood|0:TimeGettingJoy|0:TimeUnderRoof|2.274176E+07:TimeDrafted|7040:TimeOnFire|0:TimeInMentalState|0:TimeHauling|6431120:TimeHandlingAnimals|0:TimeFirefighting|0:TimeWardening|0:TimeHunting|0:TimeConstructing|0:TimeTreatingAndFeeding|0:TimeResearching|0:TimeCleaning|0:TimeRepairing|0:TimeMining|0:TimeSowingAndHarvesting|13680:TimeAsChildInColony|0:KillsEntities|0:PawnsDownedEntities|0*********0*0**FF-FF-FF-FF***[ancot.milirarace|Nals.FacialAnimation|erdelf.HumanoidAlienRaces]*|||||********FF-FF-FF-FF***
